name: Search Files Tools
description: Adds tools for searching file contents and globbing files under absolute roots.

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum wall-clock time for each search or glob tool invocation.

maxCandidateFiles.label: Max Candidate Files
maxCandidateFiles.help: Maximum number of candidate files to enumerate before marking the search as truncated.

maxSearchResults.label: Max Search Results
maxSearchResults.help: Maximum number of search result entries returned by files_search.

maxGlobResults.label: Max Glob Results
maxGlobResults.help: Maximum number of file paths returned by files_glob.
